LanguageData.Bullet_HolyLance.label: Holy Shot
LanguageData.Gun_CrusaderRifle.label: crusader assault rifle
LanguageData.Gun_CrusaderRifle.description: A general-purpose military weapon for field or urban combat. It fires a three-round burst. Good range, low power, high rate of fire. Painted to complement the Crusaders.
LanguageData.Gun_CrusaderRifle.tools.stock.label: stock
LanguageData.Gun_CrusaderRifle.tools.barrel.label: barrel
LanguageData.Gun_CrusaderRifle.verbs.Verb_Shoot.label: crusader assault rifle
LanguageData.Gun_HolyLance.label: Holy Lance
LanguageData.Gun_HolyLance.description: The Holy lance is the standard weapon used by the crusaders.
LanguageData.Gun_HolyLance.tools.handle.label: handle
LanguageData.Gun_HolyLance.tools.point.label: point
LanguageData.Gun_HolyLance.verbs.Verb_Shoot.label: Holy Lance
LanguageData.Gun_HolyRifle.label: bolt-action crusader rifle
LanguageData.Gun_HolyRifle.description: Ancient pattern bolt-action rifle. Good range, good power, low rate of fire. Painted to complement the Crusaders.
LanguageData.Gun_HolyRifle.tools.stock.label: stock
LanguageData.Gun_HolyRifle.tools.barrel.label: barrel
LanguageData.Gun_HolyRifle.verbs.Verb_Shoot.label: bolt-action crusader rifle
LanguageData.HolyCross.label: The Holy Cross
LanguageData.HolyCross.description: The Holy Cross used by the Pope to erase heresy and blasphemy.
LanguageData.HolyCross.verbs.Verb_PowerBeam.label: The Holy Cross
LanguageData.HolySword.label: Holy Sword
LanguageData.HolySword.description: The holy swords are used by the pope's elite gaurd. The swords are imbued with Gods will.
LanguageData.HolySword.tools.blade.label: blade
LanguageData.HolySword.verbs.Verb_Shoot.label: Holy Sword
LanguageData.Projectile_HolySword.label: Holy Sword
